payload.answer: Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Brain DB is the source of truth.
payload.decision: Treat Cognee as a rebuildable semantic projection; Brain DB remains the authoritative source of truth.

entity_resolution.reason: Only high-level components are referenced (Brain DB, Cognee); no external identifiers are provided to reliably resolve to specific entity IDs.

payload.intent: Store architectural decision for Brain/Cognee semantics and source-of-truth

memory_cards.statement: Brain should treat Cognee as a rebuildable semantic projection rather than the primary source of truth.
Brain DB must remain the source of truth for memory, while Cognee can be regenerated from it.

details: Stored two durable architectural rules derived from the chat conclusion.
